title: Alert Classification AI Output
description: Structured JSON output expected from the AI classification prompt. Validated by module 05 before use.

topic_slug.description: Single primary topic that best matches the event.

secondary_topics.description: Up to two secondary topics. Omit or leave empty when there are none.

headline.description: Concise, factual headline. No sensationalism. HTML-free.

summary_text.description: One to two sentence summary for the timeline. Factual, third-person. HTML-free.

severity_score.description: How disruptive or urgent the event is. 0 = no impact, 100 = extreme disruption.

importance_score.description: How broadly relevant the event is to the topic audience. 0 = noise, 100 = must-know.

confidence_score.description: Model confidence in the classification and scores. 0 = very uncertain, 100 = certain.

send_alert.description: True when the event is significant enough to warrant an immediate alert.

alert_reason.description: One sentence explaining why the event does or does not warrant an alert.

cluster_label.description: Short label for the event cluster (e.g. 'Bitcoin price rally', 'Fed rate decision'). Null if this event does not fit an obvious cluster.

examples.headline: Bitcoin Hits New All-Time High Above $120K
examples.summary_text: Bitcoin surged past $120,000, setting a new all-time high driven by strong institutional inflows and ETF demand.
examples.alert_reason: New all-time high is a high-importance milestone for the crypto audience.

examples.headline: US 10-Year Treasury Yield Edges Up 2 bps
examples.summary_text: The 10-year US Treasury yield rose marginally to 4.32%, reflecting steady demand ahead of tomorrow's CPI print.
examples.alert_reason: Minor yield movement; below the significance threshold for an intraday alert.
